song_name: Its Still Rock And Roll To Me

versions.song_name: Its Still Rock And Roll To Me

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Its Still Rock And Roll To Me

content:
From: szojak@d27.wu-wien.ac.at (Martin Szojak)

It's Still Rock 'n' Roll to Me
(Billy Joel)


[Intro]

| [ch]C[/ch]    | [ch]C[/ch]    | [ch]C[/ch]    | [ch]C[/ch]    |


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
  What's the matter with the clothes I'm wearing?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
"Can't ya tell that your tie's too wide?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
  Maybe I should buy some old tab collars?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
"Welcome back to the age of jive."[/tab]


[Chorus 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
   "Where have you been hidin' out lately, honey?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
You can't dress trashy till you spend a lot of money."[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Everybody's talkin' 'bout the new sound.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Funny, but it's still rock and roll to me.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
  What's the matter with the car I'm driving?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
"Can't ya tell that it's out of style?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
  Should I get a set of white wall tires?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
"Are you gonna cruise the miracle mile?"[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
   "Nowadays you can't be too sentimental.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Your best bet's a true baby blue Continental."[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Hot funk, cool punk, even if it's old junk,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's still rock and roll to me.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
  Oh,   it doesn't matter what they say in the papers,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
Cause it's always been the same old scene.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
Well, there's a new band in town but you can't get the sound[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
From a story in a magazine,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] N.C.
Aimed at your average teen.[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
  How about a pair of pink sidewinders[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
And a bright orange pair of pants?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
  "Well, you could really be a Beau Brummel baby,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
If you just give it half a chance."[/tab]


[Chorus 3]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
   "Don't waste your money on a new set of speakers.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
You get more mileage from a cheap pair of sneakers."[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Next phase, new wave, dance craze, anyways[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's still rock and roll to me.[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] N.C.
                  Ooooooooh[/tab]

[Verse 4]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
  What's the matter with the crowd I'm seeing?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
"Don't ya know that they're out of touch?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
  Should I try to be a straight 'A' student?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
"If ya are, then you think too much."[/tab]


[Chorus 4]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
   "Don't you know about the new fashion, honey?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
All you need are looks and a whole lotta money."[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
It's the next phase, new wave, dance craze, anyways[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's still rock and roll to me.[/tab]


[Ending]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]  N.C.     [ch]Em[/ch] N.C.           [ch]Bb[/ch]  N.C.
Everybody's talkin' 'bout the new sound.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  N.C.         [ch]G[/ch]     N.C.                 [ch]C9[/ch]
Funny, but it's still rock and roll to me.[/tab]
